description: Stylish to the T, the puma Deck is a combination of a floater and a slipper, and can be worn any which way you like. With a neat look and a grippy outsole, this is a perfect casual footwear.Upper Leather straps with velcro closures on the front and back heel, and a big toe loop for style, comfort and to create a snug Fit Removable back strap to convert it into a slipper Printed branding on lateral side of strap for style Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort Mildly textured and padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole for durability Modified leaf pattern lugs along the length of the forefoot and heel with multi-directional lugs on the periphery for maximum traction and support puma branding on midfoot that acts as a support to the inner arch shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean clothDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
